name: Batter Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange tomatoes on a piece of wax paper; salt and pepper both sides, using 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) salt and the specified amount of pepper.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and remaining 1 Tbsp salt in a medium-sized bowl.
3. Remove 1/2 cup of this mixture to a piece of wax paper.
4. Dip both sides of tomatoes in the 1/2 cup flour mixture.
5. Stir carbonated water and lemon juice into the remaining flour mixture until it foams, then stir until the consistency of pancake batter is reached.
6. Heat oil in a large skillet.
7. Dip tomatoes in batter and sauté half at a time in hot oil until golden, about 3 minutes on each side.
8. Serve immediately.
